title: Homepage loads with hero and active visual effects
description: Verifies the homepage loads and the hero section displays with its background and typewriter-style effect present.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Wait for the page to finish rendering above-the-fold content
Verify the hero section is displayed with an animated typewriter-style text effect and an active background visual effect

title: Jump to key homepage sections from primary navigation
description: Verifies a visitor can use homepage navigation to scroll to Hero, About, Projects, and Contact sections successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the navigation link to jump to the hero section
Click the navigation link to jump to the about section
Click the navigation link to jump to the projects section
Click the navigation link to jump to the contact section
Verify the contact section is displayed

title: Homepage remains usable when switching from desktop to mobile viewport
description: Verifies that the homepage layout reflows and the primary navigation collapses for a narrow viewport while content remains accessible and readable.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Set the viewport to a desktop size
Scroll through the page from top to bottom
Set the viewport to a narrow mobile size
Scroll through the page from top to bottom
Verify the navigation is collapsed into a mobile-friendly control
Verify key sections of the homepage are still visible and usable without overlapping or clipped content

title: Hero renders with typewriter animation visible
description: Verifies the homepage hero loads and shows the typewriter/terminal-style animation as part of the introduction.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Wait for the hero section to finish initial rendering
Verify the hero headline and typewriter-style animated text are displayed

title: Use mobile hamburger navigation to access homepage sections
description: Verifies a mobile visitor can open the hamburger navigation and use it to jump to a homepage section.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Resize the viewport to a narrow mobile width
Click the mobile navigation toggle to open the menu
Click the navigation link to jump to the projects section
Verify the projects section is displayed

title: Mobile hamburger navigation opens and closes without breaking layout
description: Verifies that on a narrow viewport the hamburger navigation can be opened and closed and the page remains usable.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Set the viewport to a narrow mobile size
Click the control that opens the mobile navigation menu
Click the control that closes the mobile navigation menu
Verify the mobile navigation menu is no longer visible
Verify the main page content remains visible and usable after closing the menu

title: Submit contact form successfully
description: Verifies that a visitor can submit the contact form with valid required fields and sees a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the navigation link to jump to the contact section
Fill in the name field with Test Visitor
Fill in the email field with test.visitor@example.com
Fill in the message field with This is a test inquiry from automated UI testing.
Submit the contact form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Browse projects section from homepage
description: Verifies that a visitor can reach the Projects section from the homepage and view project cards without layout issues.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the navigation link to jump to the projects section
Scroll within the projects section to view multiple project cards
Verify project cards are displayed with a title and summary visible

title: Project/service cards support tilt interaction without breaking layout
description: Verifies that moving the pointer over interactive cards produces a tilt effect while the card remains usable and the page layout stays intact.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the projects or services card grid
Move the pointer across an interactive card
Move the pointer off the card
Verify the hovered card shows a 3D/tilt interaction and the surrounding grid remains properly laid out

title: Contact form required-field validation
description: Verifies that submitting the contact form with a required field missing shows an inline validation error and does not submit.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the navigation link to jump to the contact section
Fill in the name field with Test Visitor
Fill in the email field with test.visitor@example.com
Leave the message field blank
Submit the contact form
Verify an inline validation error is visible for a required field

title: Reach Projects from Hero using navigation
description: Verifies a visitor can start at the hero and use navigation to reach the projects section successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the navigation link to jump to the projects section
Verify the projects section is displayed

title: Subscribe to newsletter successfully
description: Verifies that a visitor can subscribe from the footer newsletter form with a valid email and sees a confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the footer area
Fill valid.email@example.com into the newsletter email field
Submit the newsletter subscription
Verify a subscription confirmation is visible

title: Visual effects do not obstruct contact interactions
description: Verifies that animated/background effects do not block normal interaction with the contact area on the homepage.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the contact section
Click into the name field
Fill Sample Visitor into the name field
Verify the contact form remains interactable and text entry works normally

title: Newsletter email format validation
description: Verifies that entering an invalid email in the newsletter form shows an inline validation error and does not submit.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the footer area
Fill invalid-email into the newsletter email field
Submit the newsletter subscription
Verify an inline validation error is visible for the email field

title: Navigate from homepage to Blog and back
description: Verifies a visitor can open the Blog page from the site navigation and return to the homepage successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the navigation link to open the blog page
Click the navigation link to return to the homepage
Verify the homepage hero section is displayed

title: Recruiter navigates from careers to homepage contact section
description: Verifies a recruiter can navigate from the careers page back to the homepage and reach the contact section to begin an inquiry.

steps.description: Navigate to /career.html
Click the navigation link to return to the homepage
Click the navigation link to jump to the contact section
Verify the contact section is displayed on the homepage

title: Open About section via navigation and read content
description: Verifies a visitor can reach the About section and see biography and skills content displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the navigation link to jump to the about section
Verify the about section summary of experience and skills is displayed

title: Blog page shows a list of posts/excerpts
description: Verifies the blog index page displays multiple post entries with preview information for browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /blog.html
Wait for the page content to render
Verify a list of blog post entries with excerpt-style preview content is displayed

title: Projects section remains usable on narrow mobile viewport
description: Verifies that on a narrow viewport the Projects section renders without overlapping or off-screen content.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Resize the viewport to a narrow mobile width
Click the navigation control to open the mobile menu
Click the mobile menu link to jump to the projects section
Verify project cards are visible without horizontal overflow or overlapping content

title: Navigate from homepage to Careers and back
description: Verifies a visitor can open the Careers page from the site navigation and return to the homepage successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the navigation link to open the careers page
Click the navigation link to return to the homepage
Verify the homepage hero section is displayed

title: Careers page shows job listings and role summaries
description: Verifies the careers page displays available roles or listings with summary information for review.

steps.description: Navigate to /career.html
Wait for the page content to render
Verify a list of job listings with role summary information is displayed

title: Projects section reachable by scrolling
description: Verifies that a visitor can discover the Projects section by normal scrolling and it remains usable.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll down until the projects section is in view
Verify the projects section is displayed and contains multiple project cards

title: Section reveal animations trigger during scrolling
description: Verifies that scrolling down the homepage triggers reveal animations and content becomes visible as sections enter the viewport.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll down to the next major section below the hero
Scroll down through additional sections to trigger multiple reveals
Verify multiple sections that start hidden become visible as the user scrolls

title: Return from blog to homepage and reach Projects section via navigation
description: Verifies a visitor can navigate from the blog back to the homepage and then jump to the projects section using site navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /blog.html
Click the navigation link to return to the homepage
Click the navigation link to jump to the projects section
Verify the projects section is displayed on the homepage

title: Project cards remain readable while pointer moves across them
description: Verifies that moving the pointer over project cards does not obscure content or break usability of the cards.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the navigation link to jump to the projects section
Move the pointer across the surface of a project card
Move the pointer off the project card
Verify the project card content remains readable and the layout remains stable

title: Close mobile navigation after selecting a section
description: Verifies that after a mobile visitor selects a section link, the menu does not continue to obscure the page content.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Resize the viewport to a narrow mobile width
Click the mobile navigation toggle to open the menu
Click the navigation link to jump to the contact section
Verify the contact section is displayed without being covered by an open navigation menu

title: Projects section navigation link works after scrolling deep in page
description: Verifies that the Projects navigation link still jumps to the correct section after the user has scrolled far down the homepage.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll down near the bottom of the page
Click the navigation link to jump to the projects section
Verify the projects section is in view

title: Mobile navigation supports keyboard-only open, move focus, and close
description: Verifies keyboard-only users can open the collapsed navigation, move through items, and close it on mobile viewport.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Set the viewport to a narrow mobile size
Press Tab until the mobile navigation control is focused
Press Enter to open the mobile navigation menu
Press Tab to move focus into the opened navigation
Press Escape to close the mobile navigation menu
Verify the mobile navigation menu is closed
Verify a visible focus indicator is present on the currently focused element

title: Scroll to About section manually
description: Verifies a visitor can scroll normally to reach the About section and the content remains readable.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll down until the about section is in view
Verify the about section is displayed

title: Orientation change preserves navigation and content accessibility on mobile
description: Verifies that switching between portrait and landscape on a mobile-sized viewport preserves navigation access and keeps content usable.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Set the viewport to a narrow mobile portrait size
Set the viewport to a narrow mobile landscape size
Scroll through the page from top to bottom
Verify the mobile navigation remains accessible in landscape
Verify content remains readable and not clipped after the viewport change

title: Contact form rejects whitespace-only required input
description: Verifies that required contact form fields do not accept whitespace-only values and show validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the navigation link to jump to the contact section
Fill in the name field with spaces only
Fill in the email field with test.visitor@example.com
Fill in the message field with spaces only
Submit the contact form
Verify an inline validation error is visible for invalid required input

title: Interactive effects remain stable during rapid scroll
description: Verifies that rapid scrolling through the homepage does not prevent content from appearing or leave sections in a broken visual state.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll rapidly down near the bottom of the page
Scroll rapidly back up toward the hero
Scroll back down to the projects area
Verify key sections remain visible and usable after rapid scrolling

title: Homepage content remains readable at very small mobile viewport
description: Verifies that at an extremely small viewport the homepage remains navigable and core content does not become unusable due to overflow or occlusion.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Set the viewport to a very small mobile size
Scroll through the page from top to bottom
Verify core sections can still be found and read without content being cut off
Verify horizontal scrolling is not required to read main content

title: Newsletter form trims or rejects leading/trailing whitespace in email
description: Verifies that the newsletter subscription flow handles a valid email with surrounding spaces without confusing errors.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the footer area
Fill  valid.email@example.com  into the newsletter email field
Submit the newsletter subscription
Verify either a subscription confirmation is visible or an email validation error is visible

title: Contact form supports long message input without breaking layout
description: Verifies that entering a very long message into the contact form does not break the form layout and still allows submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the navigation link to jump to the contact section
Fill in the name field with Test Visitor
Fill in the email field with test.visitor@example.com
Fill in the message field with a very long multi-sentence message (several paragraphs)
Submit the contact form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Homepage layout remains stable at large desktop viewport
description: Verifies that on a very large desktop viewport the homepage uses available space without breaking alignment or spacing of key sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Set the viewport to a very large desktop size
Scroll through the page from top to bottom
Verify key sections remain properly laid out and visually separated
Verify primary navigation remains accessible and does not overlap content
